g.text: Standalone process → read source events → normalize to ingest.v1 → submit to Switchboard via MCP → checkpoint → repeat
No direct DB access to butler schemas | No message classification | No request_id minting
C. ingest.v1 ENVELOPE — EXPLODED VIEW (5 SECTIONS)
Tier 1 (full): raw required, full payload | Tier 2 (metadata): raw=None, normalized_text = subject/summary only
IngestAcceptedResponse → request_id (UUID7) | status: "accepted" | duplicate: bool | triage_decision | triage_target
Advisory Lock Serialization: pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(dedupe_key)) → re-check existing record → INSERT new OR return existing request_id (duplicate=true)
E. CRASH-SAFE CHECKPOINTS F. RATE LIMITING (DUAL LIMITER)
Write cursor to tmp file → atomic rename
CRASH: restart reads last cursor → replay is
Independent limiters — source API failure does NOT block Switchboard submissions
All connectors share: CachedMCPClient (SSE transport) | ConnectorMetrics (Prometheus) | Health server (/health + /metrics) | Heartbeat task | Checkpoint-after-acceptance semantics
